title: Monday Music Mix #10
summary: Okay, YOU WIN! So after a week of badgering and constant protests, I’ve decided to continue. For now.
intro: Okay, YOU WIN! So after a week of badgering and constant protests, I’ve decided to continue. For now.
Just to reiterate, the point of this project is to spead excellent music - music that may transcend genres, years, countries and more.

This mix features some new Architecture in Helsinki, a fantastic track by Streets and some other tunes that will kick start your week - guaranteed. I’m going to start including descriptions for tracks on each mix soon. Let’s see if I can get to that.
Hope you enjoy listening to this mix - made with 100% hard work and pure love. Feeling grateful? Leave a comment, say hello.
Subscribe to Monday Music Mix podcast (coming whenever I stop feeling lazy)

legacy.descriptionHtml:
Tenth

Okay, YOU WIN! So after a week of badgering and constant protests, I’ve decided to continue. For now.

Just to reiterate, the point of this project is to spead excellent music - music that may transcend genres, years, countries and more. 

This mix features some new Architecture in Helsinki, a fantastic track by Streets and some other tunes that will kick start your week - guaranteed. I’m going to start including descriptions for tracks on each mix soon. Let’s see if I can get to that.

Hope you enjoy listening to this mix - made with 100% hard work and pure love. Feeling grateful? Leave a comment, say hello.

Monday Music Mix: 10

Tracklist:

  1. Mother Mother - The Stand
  2. tUnE-yArDs - Bizness
  3. Caribou - Jamelia
  4. Rökkurró - Sólin mun skína
  5. Wavves - Horse Shoes
  6. Architecture in Helsinki - Contact High
  7. The Streets - OMG

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album (zip format)

Subscribe to Monday Music Mix podcast (coming whenever I stop feeling lazy)

Listen to Grooveshark playlist *NEW!*
